title: 4 Dividend Stocks to Buy for February 2023
text: It's February, and Valentine's Day is on everyone's mind. People bought candy, cards, flowers, jewelry and clothing and ate out at restaurants.

title: Tasty Value In Restaurant Stocks - Here Are 3 Picks For 2023
text: We track the performance of restaurant industry stocks. Easing inflationary cost pressure can be positive for margins and earnings as a bullish catalyst for share prices.

title: 3 Restaurant Stocks to Buy Despite Industry Challenges
text: Restaurants stocks like MCD, YUM and DRI are likely to benefit from robust off-premise sales, sales-building initiatives and digital initiatives.
